title: Local uninstall over-deletes shared deps (dead m.installed guard) + false-INSTALLED arch card
description:
USER-REPORTED: uninstalling LTX 2.3 (high/bf16) trashed the 8 deps balanced shares (Gemma 3 12B fp4, video+audio VAE, text-projection, spatial-upscaler, 3 baked LoRAs). Disk-verified: only the fp8 transformer survived in G:/CubricModels; recursive find for the shared files = 0 hits.

ROOT CAUSE 1 (over-delete): routes/downloadManager.js _findOtherModelsUsingDep (line ~97) gates on m.installed===true. That flag is renderer-only (set by syncModelInstalled) and ALWAYS undefined in the backend Node process, so the local shared-dep guard always returns [] -> local uninstall deletes shared files. The REMOTE path was fixed for this exact bug (MPI-122: uninstalling Wan I2V trashed the VAE+umt5 T2V shares) via _remoteSharedDepIds (asks the Pod volume). The LOCAL path never got the fix. FIX: export _localModelsCheck from routes/comfy.js; add _localSharedDepIds(excludeModelId) mirroring _remoteSharedDepIds but stat local disk; local uninstall computes sharedKeep once and gates on sharedKeep.has(dep.id), deleting _findOtherModelsUsingDep.

ROOT CAUSE 2 (false-INSTALLED, the mask): MpiModelManager.js line ~703 anyInstalled = model.installed===true || installedOps.length>0 || installedArch.length>0. The lone fp8 arch weight flips anyInstalled true, so a flat arch-variant model reads INSTALLED even with all 8 common deps missing (deriveInstalledOps already returns installedOps:[] correctly; the arch OR-clause bypasses it). Same clause in the section-sort predicate (line ~871). FIX: for a flat model, arch-weight-present must NOT alone mean installed; require common deps too (installedOps already encodes this). Keep the MPI-209 CPU-pod section-sort intent.

VERIFY: (1) with balanced fp8 on disk + shared deps missing, card reads PARTIALLY INSTALLED not INSTALLED; (2) re-Install pulls the 8 shared deps; (3) uninstall high with balanced installed KEEPS the shared deps (regression test for the guard).

STATUS 2026-07-07T15:23:12Z: BOTH fixes SHIPPED + logic-verified against LIVE disk (not yet live-verified end-to-end). PROVEN: (a) backend m.installed is undefined for ALL models -> old _findOtherModelsUsingDep guard was dead (always []); (b) new _localSharedDepsMap (via exported comfy.localModelsCheck) correctly reports on-disk shared deps as protected; (c) card: OLD anyInstalled=true (INSTALLED lie) -> NEW anyInstalled=false (PARTIALLY INSTALLED) for balanced with common deps missing; fully-installed + flat non-arch paths unchanged. PENDING LIVE-VERIFY (needs server restart for backend + renderer reload for card): (1) balanced card reads not-INSTALLED, Install re-pulls the 8 shared deps; (2) uninstall high with balanced installed KEEPS the shared Gemma/VAE/LoRAs (guard regression). Files: routes/comfy.js (export localModelsCheck), routes/downloadManager.js (_localSharedDepsMap + rewired local uninstall + fail-safe abort), js/components/Compounds/LandingPages/MpiModelManager/MpiModelManager.js (_commonDepsOnDisk gate on anyInstalled + section-sort). Changelog: UNRELEASED.md fixes.

ADDENDUM 2026-07-07T15:35:09Z: found + fixed a THIRD bug while live-testing the re-pull. Local install showed "Verifying…" at <100% while other deps were still downloading. Root cause: the LOCAL ResumableDownloader on(end) sha256 emit flipped the whole-model bar to indeterminate phase:verifying UNCONDITIONALLY when ANY single dep finished — the exact bug MPI-164 fixed for the REMOTE path (allBytesDone gate) but never ported to local. Fix: gate the local model-level sweep behind allBytesDone (this dep counts as done since it just ended; custom_nodes excluded as work-not-bytes) — mirrors remote. Per-dep verify now stays silent/determinate mid-install; sweep only shows at 100%. Gate logic asserted (3 cases PASS). File: routes/downloadManager.js on(end).
